tips.content: Keep your wrists straight and float above the keyboard
Always return your fingers to the home row position (ASDF JKL;)
Look at the screen, not your hands - trust your muscle memory
Take a 5-minute break every 25 minutes to prevent strain
Accuracy is more important than speed - speed will come naturally
Use all fingers - don't rely on just your index fingers
Keep a steady rhythm rather than typing in bursts
